title: stelis synsepala
intro: Stelis synsepala, also known as the Synsepala orchid, is a type of flowering plant in the family Orchidaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Stelis synsepala are attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, Stelis synsepala is often used in tea form or as a tincture, where it can be used to treat various ailments, including bronchitis and other respiratory issues.
